value.found_quote: As a Claude Managed Agent, the same template runs autonomously on the Claude Platform, for work that spans a whole book of deals or a nightly schedule.
value.rationale: The page describes "Claude Managed Agents" as an Anthropic offering that runs agent templates autonomously on the Claude Platform, used alongside Claude Code. The getting started section explicitly states they are available "as Managed Agents in the Claude Platform (in public beta)," substantiating the claim. The claim's specific April 8, 2026 launch date is not on this page (this page is dated May 5, 2026), but the offering itself and its public beta status are clearly described.
